title: Build the diagnosable M02 contract foundation

limits.new_production_dependencies: allow one mature local tracing writer only when its pinned footprint and failure behavior are reviewed
limits.architecture_changes: additive observability plus the owner-approved stable Project ID and WorkspaceBinding contract from DEC-0006; no implementation ownership change

stop_conditions: diagnostics capture prompt, response, credential, hidden reasoning or unrestricted project content
the protocol requires a breaking change to the accepted M01 epoch
required test fails after two bounded repair attempts
scope expands into project mutation implementation or desktop review UI
